project_type: macOS SwiftUI desktop app (requires macOS 14+, Swift 6.0+)
test_framework: XCTest via swift test - 220 tests across 6 test files in Tests/KiroKantokuTests/
verification_instructions: Run swift build to verify compilation, then swift test to verify all 220 tests pass
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Swift 6.2.1 installed via system dnf. No macOS available for running the app, but builds compile successfully on Linux with #if os(macOS) guards. Tests are model/logic tests that run on Linux.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing codebase patterns.
key_patterns: Existing hover pattern: @State private var isHovered: Bool = false, then .onHover { hovering in withAnimation(.easeInOut(duration: 0.2)) { isHovered = hovering } }. Used in TaskCard, AgentCard, WorkspaceAgentsView AgentRow, WorktreeAgentsList. Design constants centralized in DesignConstants.swift. Buttons use .buttonStyle(.plain) with manual styling. No reusable hover button style exists yet - hover effects are implemented inline per-view.
directory_structure: Sources/KiroKantoku/Views/Agent/ - Chat panel, message rendering, input views. Sources/KiroKantoku/Views/Dashboard/ - Multi-task overview grid, agent cards. Sources/KiroKantoku/Views/Task/ - Task detail view, task cards. Sources/KiroKantoku/Views/Components/ - Shared UI components including DesignConstants. Tests/KiroKantokuTests/ - Unit tests for models and services.
